scripts.dev: VITE_GOOGLE_TAG_ID=G-0000000000 VITE_JWT_TEST=$(./spy.sh martin com.martincastroalvarez.secrets JWT_TEST) pnpm -C apps/web dev
scripts.init: pnpm run update && AWS_PROFILE='martin' pnpm exec cdk bootstrap
scripts.build:web:with-tag: VITE_GOOGLE_TAG_ID=$(./spy.sh martin com.martincastroalvarez.secrets GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_ID) pnpm --filter @geometry/web build
scripts.build:api: pnpm run build:api:black && pnpm run build:api:isort && pnpm run build:api:flake8 && pnpm run build:api:pytest && pnpm run build:api:coverage
scripts.build: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:cdk
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:cdk && pnpm run build:web:with-tag
scripts.deploy: pnpm run update && pnpm run build:all && AWS_PROFILE='martin' pnpm exec cdk deploy --require-approval never --all && pnpm run publish
scripts.publish: DISTRIBUTION_ID=$(cat ./outputs.json | jq -r '.GeometryStack.GeometryDistributionId') && AWS_PROFILE='martin' aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $DISTRIBUTION_ID --paths "/*"
